heading: Special certificates for civilian service to armed forces
label: 51906 Special certificates for civilian service to armed forces
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5190646 App.:2006., , .Pub. L. 100–324, § 7102 Stat. 577May 30, 1988
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5190646 App.:2006., , .Pub. L. 100–324, § 7102 Stat. 577May 30, 1988

children.heading: .—General Authority
children.label: a .—General Authority
children.text: The Maritime Administrator may issue a special certificate to an individual, or the personal representative of an individual, in recognition of service of that individual in the merchant marine of the United States, if the service has been determined to be active duty under section 401 of the GI Bill Improvement Act of 1977 (; note).Public Law 95–20238 U.S.C. 106

children.heading: .—Relationship to Other Laws
children.label: b .—Relationship to Other Laws
children.text: Issuance of a certificate under subsection (a) does not entitle an individual to any rights, privileges, or benefits under a law of the United States.
